name: Python 3
postStartCommand: if [ -f /workspaces/testepy/configure_git_user.sh ]; then cd /workspaces/testepy && bash ./configure_git_user.sh; else echo 'configure_git_user.sh not found, skipping.'; fi
postAttachCommand: if [ -f /workspaces/testepy/configure_git_user.sh ]; then cd /workspaces/testepy && bash ./configure_git_user.sh; else echo 'configure_git_user.sh not found, skipping.'; fi
